title: polypodium simplex
intro: Polypodium simplex, also known as Polypodium leucotomos, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polypodium simplex include protecting against UV-induced damage, reducing oxidative stress, and potentially alleviating symptoms of certain skin conditions such as psoriasis. Herbal preparations of Polypodium simplex are often used in topical creams, ointments, and tinctures, and can also be consumed in capsule or tea form, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
